title: Duplicate expressions possibly due to spilled event control expressions in LTL statements

features.name: disable iff in concurrent assertion
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assertion with disable iff construct using a computed condition
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clock) disable iff (cond) a |=> b ##1 c);

features.name: cover property with label and disable iff
features.description: Code should include a cover property with a string label and disable iff construct
features.snippet: cool_prop: cover property (@(posedge clock) disable iff (x4) d |-> (s_eventually e));

features.name: LTL sequence implication operator |=>
features.description: Code should include an LTL sequence with the overlapping implication operator (|=>)
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clock) a |=> b ##1 c);

features.name: LTL sequence implication operator |->
features.description: Code should include an LTL sequence with the non-overlapping implication operator (|->)

features.name: s_eventually operator in LTL property
features.description: Code should include an LTL property using the s_eventually operator (strong eventually)
